schema.description: Request to run an agent. A request MUST supply either `messages` (a non-empty conversation) or `input` (for input-form triggered agents).

input.description: Input fields for an input-form triggered agent.

messages.description: Messages to pass to the agent. When provided, the array MUST contain at least one message and each message MUST specify a valid `role` and non-empty `content`.

metadata.description: Metadata to pass to the agent.

stream.description: Whether to stream the run response as server-sent events.

schema.title: PlatformAgentRunCreateRequest
